reviews.review_title: needs a in car view for driving
reviews.review_description:
i bought this because i thought it would be a first person pov  driver. instead i get the vr equivalent of Slot car racing.  Include an option to be the driver in the cars and i will give 5 stars
edited as promised 5 stars..............

developer_response.body: Hi turtlejj22 - you can indeed play from within the car. Simply double-click either right or left on the swipe pad and you'll be able to cycle through all available cameras. Double-click was implemented as the default to prevent accidental camera switching while playing. You can change this to a single click in the menus if you'd prefer. Also, to change view off the car (or back on) simply click and hold in either right or left on the swipe pad. Hope that helps!

reviews.review_description: This title is just as good as the quest version only one thing use a controler and you will have hours of fun

I absolutely love this game on my Quest. However; with this said. I’m going to discuss the fact this is the exact same game as the quest. The Go controller works like crap, you pretty much have a controller. Why are we getting charged for a game that uses my saves on Quest. I get into the game expecting to be able to play from the beginning, but I have all stars for every course already. If you’ve never played this game. It’s a definite buy, but have a controller.

developer_response.body:
UPDATE: We've just released an update which will disable cross save by default. You can then "Delete all data" from within the new 'Savedata' options tab and start fresh if you wish. For anyone wanting cross save functionality with Quest and Rift, we've added a toggle in the same savedata tab where you can enable it. Additionally, we've improved the new player experience and made the overall control schemes easier to understand. Hope it helps! :)

Hi ARCHMOWiE - we're looking into breaking off cross-save compatibility as we agree it's not best suited for that. We'll update here soon with more info on this.

reviews.review_description:
Superb graphics - can be very easy or very hard - Great controler controls.  

Funny car design.  You gotta to love this game.

I was expecting something like BlazeRush but it is more like Mario Kart

I’m not sure how they do this but this game is fun! I love the bumper game it’s like playing soccer or volleyball with your car fantastic! It’s a lot of fun if I could just stop clicking on outer view while I am driving that would be great I haven’t played the entire game but I will say this was well worth the money have fun!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! You might want to try changing the VR camera change to double click in the menus to prevent accidental camera switching. Hope that helps! :)

reviews.review_description: I tried out a different control option, which actually made the experience feel really smooth. I also really like the graphics, they look amazing. I feel like I’m getting motion sickness cause it just feels so real. Good job

developer_response.body:
Hey SuburbanShicken - while the Go controller is somewhat limited in ability we did put a lot of effort into supporting the game's massive feature and control set with the 3DOF controller. Have you revised the control mapping screen? You can find it by pressing the menu button - all controls are listed on the clipboard front and center. Additionally, we've found that some user's Go touchpad has become somewhat unreliable so we've also added a gyro rotation option which we find works well. We would also recommend playing from any of the the 'top views' if you're feeling any kind of motion sickness from the cockpit view. Another feature to keep in mind is that the game can be played with a gamepad as well so if you have one of those that might be your preferred way to play.

Having said all of that, we are finalising an update to the game now to better onboard players to the Go's various control options. Expect to see it soon.

reviews.review_description:
You cant make a game like this better.
Gyro works fine for the oculus controller.
If you change the view to first person its really
hard action. Best played on a moving office chair.
But sadly I am getting motion sickness. I nearly had to puke.
Hard game....
